instructions: Review classification.existing_matches and classification.novel_categories. Edit, add, or remove entries, then re-run with --resume (without --classify-only) to apply.

existing_matches.name: Doxing

policy.clause: Generative AI services shall not generate content that infringes upon others' lawful rights and interests, including reputation, honor, privacy, or personal information.

existing_matches.reasoning: Privacy infringement here most concretely maps to exposing private personal information about a person without consent, which is doxing.
